zh.lifeSummary: 當Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg於1127年出生在德國海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫雷克林豪森馬爾額爾德時，她的父親Hermann von Stromberg26歲，母親Gisela von Schalksberg21歲。她與Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 沙包格林特爾結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1162年在德國享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg于1127年出生在德国海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫雷克林豪森馬爾額爾德时，她的父亲Hermann von Stromberg26岁，母亲Gisela von Schalksberg21岁。她与Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 沙包格林特爾结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1162年在德国享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Stromberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Lennart, Arndt, Gunn, Knute, Lisen, Maija, Mats, Nels, Olle, Thor.
German: habitational name from any of various places sonamed, in Westphalia, Rhineland, and Hesse.
Swedish(Strömberg): ornamental name composed of the elementsström ‘river’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Gisela
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Giselle
meanings: name of Frankish origin, from the Germanic word gisil ‘pledge’. It was a common practice in medieval Europe to leave children as pledges for an alliance, to be brought up at a foreign court, and the name may be derived as a byname from this practice. This was the name by which the wife of Duke Rollo of Normandy ( c.860– c.930 ) was known. On her account the name enjoyed considerable popularity in France from an early period. Use of the name in English-speaking countries is much more recent, and is due mainly to the ballet Giselle (first performed in 1841 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg was born in 1127, in Oelde, Marl, Recklinghausen, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany, her father, Hermann von Stromberg, was 26 and her mother, Gisela von Schalksberg, was 21. She married Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg in Rinteln, Schaumburg, Lower Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1162, in Germany, at the age of 35.

Elle a épousé Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg à Rinteln, Landkreis Schaumburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1162, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg 1127 in Oelde, Marl, Recklinghausen, Provinz Westfalen, Preußen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hermann von Stromberg 26 und ihre Mutter Gisela von Schalksberg 21. Sie hat in Rinteln, Landkreis Schaumburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1162 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Deutschland.

Lei sposato Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg nel Rinteln, Landkreis Schaumburg, Niedersachsen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Strombergが1127年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンレックリンガウセンマルルオエルドで生まれた時，父Hermann von Strombergは26歳，母Gisela von Schalksbergは21歳であった。ドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス スチャウンブルグリンテルンでKonrad I von Rüdenberg zu Strombergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1162年にドイツで35歳で死去した。

ko.Oelde, Marl, Kreis Recklinghausen, Provi: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 레클링하우센 말를 드
ko.lifeSummary: Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg(이)가 1127년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 레클링하우센 말를 드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hermann von Stromberg(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gisela von Schalksberg(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 샤버그 린텔에서 Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1162년 독일에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg em Rinteln, Landkreis Schaumburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gisela von Stromberg Erbin von Stromberg родилась в 1127 г. в местности оелд, марл, рекклингхаусен, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия, её отцу по имени Hermann von Stromberg было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Gisela von Schalksberg, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg в местности ринтелн, ландкрис щаумбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1162 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 35 лет.

Se casó con Konrad I von Rüdenberg zu Stromberg en Rinteln, Landkreis Schaumburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija.
